title: 20 theme song
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 theme song (no spoilers)             Quote Post by nora-kun » Fri Jul 31, 2009 2:21 pm I've looked through a bit and haven't seen a thread on this yet (so sorry if there has already been one) But I was wondering... You know how the theme tune for 1.0 was beautiful world by Utada Hikaru, well what's the theme tune for 2.0/is there even one? I seem to remember it saying here and on ANN that there was going to be one and it was going to be done by Utada Hikaru.. PS. Sorry if this is considered a spoiler, but I don't see how it could be one...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 31, 2009 2:59 pm It's an acoustic version of Beautiful World: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by nora-kun » Fri Jul 31, 2009 3:11 pm okay, thank you a lot :3

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jul 31, 2009 4:24 pm SSD: this one doesnt have a spoiler bg http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ej9B9NueDho&feature=related

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jul 31, 2009 10:44 pm Thanks Axell.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Jul 31, 2009 11:36 pm I need to get a copy of that song. Me likey.
